assertionResults.title: Deep links coexist with persisted recent/history preferences

steps.expected: Explicit deep link loads Validation Fixture while preserving persisted saved lookup and default history preferences
steps.observed: Route loaded /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL with 2 stored matches, Load More Matches visible, localStorage preserved saved lookup and history preferences

steps.action: Inspect persisted browser state after route load
steps.expected: Explicit route wins over persisted state and saved lookup/history preferences remain available
steps.observed: localStorage contained leagueback_saved_lookups for Validation Fixture#LOCAL and leagueback_history_preferences with default filters; page stayed on Validation Fixture route

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser warnings only from Recharts width/height calculation during chart render
evidence.network: App served successfully on http://127.0.0.1:3005; route rendered current repo state with older-history controls visible

assertionResults.title: Filtering and export stay consistent after mixed history loading

steps.action: Open deep-linked player route and exhaust stored history until older-history path is available
steps.expected: Append-ready state and Load More Matches control surface after stored history
steps.observed: Initial page showed 'append ready' copy and a visible Load More Matches button with 2 of 2 loaded matches

steps.expected: Older-history matches append without duplicates and counts update truthfully
steps.observed: Dashboard settled at 4 of 4 loaded matches with four match cards visible (Ahri, Leona, Sejuani, Thresh) and Load More Matches control disappeared

steps.action: Apply Result filter = Victories after mixed load
steps.expected: Filtered list/counts/export scope reflect combined loaded set only
steps.observed: UI updated to 2 of 4 loaded matches, 1 active filter, and Export scope: 2 filtered loaded matches showing Ahri and Sejuani only

steps.action: Add Impact category = Guaranteed losses to force zero-result state
steps.expected: Zero-result copy, counts, and export availability remain truthful
steps.observed: UI updated to 0 of 4 loaded matches, Export scope: 0 filtered loaded matches, and showed explicit empty-state copy 'No loaded matches match these filters'

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser warnings only from Recharts width/height calculation during chart render
evidence.network: Load More Matches triggered older-history append in the live UI; no duplicate cards observed after mixed load

frictions.description: agent-browser text export includes Next.js dev payload and injected chart CSS after visible page text, so visible assertions were confirmed primarily from screenshots plus the leading text sections of exported body captures.
frictions.resolution: Used annotated screenshots and inspected the top portion of saved body-text artifacts for counts and copy.

summary: Validated 2 assertions on the live app at port 3005. VAL-CROSS-002 passed with deep-link route precedence plus preserved saved lookup/history preferences. VAL-CROSS-003 passed after mixed stored+appended history loading, with truthful filtered counts/export scope and a correct zero-result state.
